name: Checkout URL, canonical, and deployed Paytrail parity
decision: R-5 local source remediation is complete. Checkout now uses URL navigation, checkout utility pages remain noindex/no-canonical, client Paytrail callbacks use the canonical public site URL, and the Paytrail Edge Function locally allowlists checkout success/cancel callback URLs. Deployed Paytrail parity remains blocked because the active Supabase function source differs from local and does not contain the new allowlist/default-canonical callback policy.

implemented.purpose: Routes cart checkout through navigate('/checkout') so the visible checkout state cannot render on a stale product or catalog URL.
Sends Paytrail success/cancel URLs from publicSiteUrl instead of window.location.origin.
Defaults Paytrail callbacks to the canonical www host and normalizes client-provided success/cancel URLs through an allowed-origin and allowed-path policy.

Adds a regression check for checkout URL navigation, checkout noindex/no-canonical policy, edge checkout route allowance, Paytrail callback allowlisting, and server-side price/stock validation contract.

blockers.blocker: Deployed payments_create_paytrail source does not match local R-5 source and lacks callback allowlist/canonical www default.
blockers.required_resolution: Deploy supabase/functions/payments_create_paytrail/index.ts to project rcmmbwdebnmicrweoiyz, then redownload and verify source parity plus provider-safe callback env.

blockers.blocker: Paytrail merchant credential and callback env values were not loaded into the local shell, so secret state and live payment creation were not verified.
blockers.required_resolution: Verify Paytrail secrets and FRONTEND_SUCCESS_URL/FRONTEND_CANCEL_URL/FRONTEND_ALLOWED_ORIGINS through secret-safe provider readback; do not print secret values.

blockers.blocker: The local cart-to-checkout URL navigation fix is not proven on production until current app source is deployed.
blockers.required_resolution: Deploy current app build and run a live cart-to-checkout browser smoke verifying the URL changes to /checkout.

verification.command: /Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Run the Vite production build for Mitra Auto. Return only: pass/fail, any errors, and any warnings that affect release quality. Do not include repetitive bundling output." -- npm run build
source ~/.config/projects/bin/project && project mitraauto && supabase functions list --project-ref "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF" -o json
Playwright MCP rendered local checkout utility routes on http://127.0.0.1:4175
